name: Unikraft
description: Fast, secure unikernel development kit enabling custom minimal ultra-lightweight VM images with sub-millisecond boot.

seo.title: Unikraft — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Unikraft: Fast, secure unikernel development kit enabling custom minimal ultra-lightweight VM images with sub-millisecond boot.

when_to_use: Custom minimal unikernel VM images with sub-millisecond boot
Security-hardened VMs with minimal attack surface for microservices
Ultra-lightweight VM images for edge and serverless deployments
Build-your-own unikernel from POSIX libraries with Unikraft
Fast-booting isolated VMs replacing containers for security

pros: Tiny images with minimal attack surface
Strong performance for microservices and FaaS
cons: Porting existing apps can be nontrivial
Smaller library ecosystem vs full Linux
review.verdict: Serious unikernel toolkit with real boot-time wins, but you trade Linux compatibility for speed and size.
review.best_for: Teams building latency-sensitive FaaS or specialized appliances from scratch
review.not_for: Shops wanting to lift-and-shift generic Linux apps without porting work
